# `draw.trendAngle`

> **Stability:** experimental
> **Since:** 0.3
> **Bucket:** `lines`
> **Wire kind:** `trend-angle`

Draw a line between two anchors plus a small arc + angle label at
the `a` anchor. The angle is the screen-space slope between `a`
and `b`, formatted as `${value.toFixed(1)}°`.

## Anchors

`a`, `b` — two `WorldPoint`s

Anchor count: 2.

## Signature

```ts
function trendAngle(a: WorldPoint, b: WorldPoint, opts?: LineDrawStyle): DrawingHandle;
```

_The leading `slotId: string` parameter is injected by the chartlang compiler at every callsite — script authors call `draw.trendAngle(...)` without it._

## Example

```ts
import { defineIndicator } from "@invinite-org/chartlang-core";
    export default defineIndicator({
        name: "draw.trendAngle demo",
        apiVersion: 1,
        compute({ bar, draw }) {
            draw.trendAngle(
                { time: bar.time, price: bar.low },
                { time: bar.time, price: bar.high },
                { color: "#22c55e" },
            );
        },
    });
```
